title: Egyptian Tagine Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful vegetarian stew inspired by North African cuisine.

ingredients.name: Rest of the World Sweet Potatoes

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the Spicy Moroccan Chickpeas and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the Crunchy Carrots and Egyptian Eggplant, and cook for 3 minutes.
Add the Rest of the World Sweet Potatoes and Vegetarian Meat Substitute, and cook for 2 minutes.
Add 2 cups of vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt, pepper, and any additional spices as desired.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
